summary: Engineering change order split combinational cell.
description: Engineering change order split combinational cell.

options.name: -all
options.description: Split all MBCB instances to SBFF instances. Default is false.

options.name: -force
options.description: Force to split the flip-comb regardless timing gains. Default is false.

options.name: -fullSplit
options.description: set -fullSplit to completely split to single bits.

options.name: -inst
options.description: <combInstName | {{Mbcb1 combCell1} {Mbcb2 combCell2}...}> The names of the comb instance to be splitted. If the input is a string of MBCB/Cell pairs list, it will split the MBCB to the spcified Cell without evaluation

options.name: -legal
options.description: To place the split flip-comb at legal location. Default is false.

options.name: -listFile
options.description: The file containing names of MBCB instances to split. Specify one instance on one line. Comment with #. Instance name should not contain spaces or backslashes. And if Specify one instance and one cell on one line, it will split the MBCB to the spcified cell without evaluation

options.name: -postCTS
options.description: Set -postCTS if design stage is postCTS.

options.name: -postRoute
options.description: Set -postRoute if design stage is postRoute.

options.name: -preCTS
options.description: Set -preCTS if design stage is preCTS.

options.name: -skipRoute
options.description: set -skipRoute if stage is postRoute and globalDetailRoute is not necessary after split.
